# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09 
Resources: 
  MyAppInstance: 
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Instance"
    Properties: 
      ImageId: "ami-0abcdef1234567890" #Replace this with your AMI ID
      KeyName: "myapp-key"  #Replace with your Key Name
      InstanceType: "t2.micro" #Replace with your instanceType
      SubnetId: "subnet-123456" #Replace with your subnetId
      BlockDeviceMappings: 
        - 
          DeviceName: "/dev/sdm"
          Ebs: 
            VolumeType: "io1"
            Iops: "200"
            DeleteOnTermination: "false"
            VolumeSize: "20"
